Internal MVP Lab

Test unfinished features away from customers.

Each not-ready feature gets its own small MVP test. We can verify the customer flow, compliance guardrails, data captured, audit event, and vendor gap before turning anything on in the public portal.

Readiness Snapshot

Modules mapped12
MVP checks passed0
Vendor/API gaps0
Not tested yet12

This page is for internal testing. Do not treat mock pass results as live vendor, legal, or security approval.

MVP test only

Payment Checkout

Why this matters

Confirm plan selection, consent copy, receipt, refund/cancel workflow, and no advance-fee compliance risk before Stripe goes live.

MVP test

Create a fake checkout session and show what the customer sees after payment.

Pass criteria

Plan, price, cancellation notice, receipt event, and failed-payment path are logged.

Next real step

Connect Stripe test mode, then compliance review before live payments.

MVP Test Log

No MVP checks have been run in this browser yet.

Credit Vivo

Results vary. Credit Vivo does not guarantee removals, approvals, or credit score increases. You may dispute inaccurate credit report information directly with the credit bureaus at no cost.
